# Auto Repair in Delray Beach, FL

> Complete auto repair in Delray Beach, FL. All foreign & domestic vehicles. Honest service, fair prices. Call (561) 272-1886 to schedule.

## Contact
- Phone: (561) 272-1886
- Email: ricosautorepair@gmail.com
- Address: 1 Linton Blvd #23, Delray Beach, FL 33444
- Website: https://ricos-auto-repair-production.up.railway.app/

## Services
  - Diagnostics
  - Brakes &amp; Suspension
  - Maintenance
  - Engine &amp; Cooling
  - Transmission Service
  - Pre-Purchase Inspections

## Service Area
- Primary: Delray Beach, FL
- Also serving: greater Delray Beach metropolitan area
